axi_dmac_probe.queued_descriptors: configuration is snapshotted on accepted submit and completed in FIFO order

rx_payload.enabled_channel_packing: ascending scan index, disabled channels omitted
rx_payload.sample_type: signed 12-bit two's-complement in a 16-bit storage slot
rx_payload.phase_continuity: preserved across DMA segments and cyclic callbacks; reset only by device reset

special_reads.0x016: calibration request bits self-clear after modeled side effects
special_reads.0x1e6: RX baseband-filter calibration R2346 component code
special_reads.0x1eb: RX baseband-filter calibration C3 MSB component code
special_reads.0x1ec: RX baseband-filter calibration C3 LSB component code

rx_bbf_calibration.other_bandwidths: component codes are derived from the inverse-RC equation consumed by the pinned ADI driver

fft_accelerator.output: uint32 little-endian linear-power bins, channel-major and natural order
fft_accelerator.arithmetic: deterministic integer radix-2 with one-bit scaling per stage (1/N amplitude)
fft_accelerator.fidelity_boundary: functional firmware contract only; no synthesized or timing-closed XC7Z020 RTL is claimed

known_non_equivalences: RX IQ payload is deterministic synthesized tone data rather than samples from an analog RF input
TX IQ payload is consumed but has no RF effect
No analog/RF propagation or impairment model is inside QEMU
The software-visible QEMU PL FFT ABI exists, but no synthesized or timing-closed XC7Z020 RTL implementation is claimed
AD9361 calibration timing is collapsed to immediate completion
AD9361 calibration outputs are representative functional codes, not a die-, temperature- or process-variation model
